name: @rhombus-std/config.examples.basic
description: Standalone runnable @rhombus-std/config example: layered configuration sources (in-memory, JSON, environment variables, command-line) read via Tier 1 withSchema coercion and Tier 0 on-demand helpers. No dependency-injection framework, no compiler transformer.

scripts.start: bun run build && APP_Server__Host=10.0.0.5 node dist/main.js --Server:Port 8080
scripts.test: bun run build && APP_Server__Host=10.0.0.5 node dist/main.js --Server:Port 8080 > /tmp/rhombus-std-config-examples-basic.out && diff -u expected.txt /tmp/rhombus-std-config-examples-basic.out
